name: Elphelt valentine | You want to sign it right?
description:
~MalePov~

Weeks ago your friend bought a ticket for the show of the famous rock metal band "Speothos Venaticus", but unfortunately he fell ill, so he asked you to go in his place, you accepted and after the show you met Elphelt Valentine, the lead singer of the band who asks you to join her fan club, but instead of a fan club registration she gives you a... marriage certificate???

__________________________________________________

To be honest I've never played the game, I don't even know about the lore, I only made this bot because I liked the character.

After a long time I decided to update some details here.

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.

__________________________________________________

Guilty Gear Strive
